PAS_ssl.subject: [First name] — [town] [trade] website flagged 'Not Secure'
PAS_ssl.opening:
Hi [Name],

I had a look at [business URL] this morning — your site is currently flagged 'Not Secure' in Chrome because the SSL certificate hasn't been activated.
PAS_ssl.agitate: For a [trade] business in [town], that warning appears to every customer who finds you on Google. Some will leave without making contact.
PAS_ssl.solve: It's a quick fix — usually sorted within a day. Happy to run you through it if useful.

PAS_mobile.subject: [First name] — [town] [business] site isn't mobile-friendly
PAS_mobile.opening:
Hi [Name],

I checked [business URL] this morning — on mobile it's not displaying properly. The text overlaps and the contact number isn't clickable.
PAS_mobile.agitate: Most local searches for [trade] in [town] happen on mobile. If the site is broken on a phone, you're losing customers before they've even read the page.
PAS_mobile.solve: It's fixable without rebuilding the site. Happy to show you what it looks like if that's useful.

BAB_no_website.subject: [Business name] — [town] [trade]: customers can't find you online
BAB_no_website.opening:
Hi [Name],

I was looking for [trade] businesses in [town] this morning and noticed [Business] doesn't have a website.
BAB_no_website.before: Right now, anyone searching Google for a [trade] in [town] won't find you — they'll find whoever has a site.
BAB_no_website.after: A simple one-page site with your phone number, services, and a few reviews would put you on the map for local searches.
BAB_no_website.bridge: It doesn't need to be complicated. Happy to show you what that might look like.

AIDA_social.subject: [First name] — [N] people reviewed [Business], but your site isn't ranking
AIDA_social.opening:
Hi [Name],

[Business] has [N] Google reviews — that's a strong local reputation in [town].
AIDA_social.interest: The problem is that reputation doesn't show up in Google search results because the site isn't optimised for '[trade] [town]' searches.
AIDA_social.desire: A few specific changes to the site would put you at the top of local results, where the reviews can do their job.
AIDA_social.action: Happy to show you what I mean if you're curious.
